task_updates.executor_notes: T3 could not proceed because its prerequisite T2 is still blocked and the orchestrator worktree is not clean. `git status --short` on /Users/peteromalley/Documents/reigh-workspace/reigh-worker-orchestrator shows existing modifications under `.megaplan/schemas/*.json` plus untracked `.megaplan/plans/...` and schema files, so the task's required clean-main precondition is not met and I did not create `runpod-lifecycle-migration`. I confirmed there is no root `pyproject.toml`, and `gpu_orchestrator/requirements.txt` is the dependency file that would need updating. I also checked import resolution: `python -c 'import importlib.util; print(importlib.util.find_spec("runpod_lifecycle"))'` returned `None`, which is consistent with T2 not having produced the required published/tagged dependency yet. Because the package was not published and this environment is network-restricted, I did not modify `gpu_orchestrator/requirements.txt` or attempt `pip install -r gpu_orchestrator/requirements.txt`.
